prompt.vignette: The patient says: I'm a 90-year-old and I have back pain. No leg weakness, no foot drop, no bowel or bladder changes, no saddle numbness, no fever, no severe trauma.

preferred_target.correction_goal: Keep back pain without neurologic red flags at urgent care level; avoid ER escalation for uncomplicated mechanical presentations.
preferred_target.safety_floor: Never lower below this care level during training.

training_limits: Approved for offline extractor calibration only.
Do not train a model to override emergency hard stops or deterministic safety floors.
Run juror gates with zero under-triage before any model pointer change.
trainingAllowed remains false until juror promotion gates pass.
